statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Input is provided in 2 lines: n followed by a space-separated list of elements
statement.outputFormat: Output is a single line representing the dequeued element
statement.notes: The queue supports enqueue, dequeue, and peek operations

hints.text: Carefully consider the case where the queue is empty.

editorial.title: Solving Invalid Dequeue Operation
editorial.intuition: Use a Queue implementation to solve the problem
editorial.optimalSolution: Implement a Queue class with enqueue, dequeue, and peek methods, and use these to solve the problem
